metadata.description: Six focused SEO + e-commerce skills for Claude Code, built from real 2026 recovery cases. Includes free-tools beginner audit, post-Core-Update recovery playbook, decision-maker PDF outreach report, channel economics analyzer (Amazon/OTTO/Shop profitability), competitor deep audit (DataForSEO-powered keyword-gap analysis), and PSI weekly cron baseline (automated performance regression detection).

plugins.name: seo-rescue
plugins.description: Six complementary SEO and e-commerce skills built from real 2026 recovery cases. Covers free-tools beginner audit, post-Core-Update Authority-First recovery, 10-chapter PDF outreach report (Sistrix + DataForSEO + PSI), marketplace channel economics analyzer (Amazon/OTTO/Shop break-even per channel), competitor deep audit with keyword-gap analysis, and PSI weekly cron baseline for performance regression detection. Complements existing audit-focused skills like claude-seo with rescue-framing, decision-maker communication, channel-level financial analysis, and free-tier workflows.
